task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `VideoEditorPage` so the existing persist effect now exits when `timelines.data` has loaded and does not contain the active `timelineId`, which prevents stale IDs from being written back into tool settings. Added a new validation effect immediately after the persist effect that clears both `lastTimelineId` and the URL search param when a loaded timelines list does not contain the active ID. Verified the effect order in source and ran `npm exec tsc -- --noEmit` successfully.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `VideoEditorPage.tsx` now clears both the URL param and `lastTimelineId` when loaded `timelines.data` does not contain the active `timelineId`, the persist effect early-returns on that same stale-id condition so it cannot re-write the stale value, and the validation effect is declared immediately after the persist effect.
